brief_justification: Correct answer (A) with valid reasoning; goes one level beyond surface by mapping all time slots into a table to find the gap; no explicit self-monitoring of reasoning process; verifies by showing all slots are accounted for 7am-6pm leaving only 6pm-9pm; no explicit uncertainty acknowledgment beyond implicit constraint checking; implicitly rejects other options by showing those times are occupied but doesn't explicitly evaluate alternatives; full derivation trail from constraints to conclusion is reproducible.
